input: I want a refund for order 1234. The headphones stopped working after one day.
output: I'm so sorry to hear your headphones stopped working. I've successfully processed a refund for your order 1234 for $79.99. You should see the refund reflected in your account within 3–5 business days.

tool_calls.name: process_refund

arguments.reason: Headphones stopped working after one day.

tool_calls.result: {"refund_id": "REF-1234-001", "order_id": "1234", "amount": 79.99, "status": "approved", "message": "Refund of $79.99 approved. You will see it in 3\u20135 business days."}
